title: blechnum pallidum
intro: Blechnum pallidum, also known as the pale chain fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Blechnaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Blechnum pallidum include its ability to help alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Blechnum pallidum typically involve drying and crushing the fronds, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
